description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a double-edged design and a pointed tip, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The blade is a uniform green color and appears to be made from a single material, with a subtle taper from the hilt to the tip. The crossguard is simple and straight, extending horizontally on both sides of the blade, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and matches the color of the blade, ending in a geometric, faceted pommel that adds balance and grip security. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on the blade, guard, or handle, giving the sword a utilitarian and modern appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, with a focus on clean lines and minimalism.
description: A long, straight, double-edged green sword with a simple crossguard and cylindrical handle, featuring a faceted pommel and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and the geometric pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with the crossguard visible as a narrow bar.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and pommel from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the alignment of the handle and crossguard.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, smooth, matching green color, faceted pommel
